overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy video game showing a character walking toward and through a massive gothic castle gate at night. The character passes other students, enters a covered stone archway, and emerges into a vast courtyard with an illuminated castle facade and spires against a dark cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge leading to castle gate

events.description: location text 'Hogwarts North Exit' appears at bottom left of screen
NPC students walk past the camera character in opposite directions

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone bridge toward the illuminated gothic gate

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking toward the gate
student carrying books walking past the camera

entered.detail: massive gothic stone archway with pointed spires and iron portcullis
tall illuminated spires visible behind the gate structure
waist-high stone walls with carved gothic details lining the bridge
black vintage street lamps casting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone bridge toward a massive gothic castle gate at night. Warm lamplights illuminate the stone walls while other students walk past. The location text 'Hogwarts North Exit' appears as the character approaches the imposing archway with tall spires visible in the background.

events.description: entering the covered stone archway gate, transitioning from outdoor bridge to indoor passage
moving deeper into the dimly lit tunnel with only wall-mounted lamps for illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered stone archway passage toward the light at the far end

notable_agents.action: student walking ahead through the archway toward the courtyard exit

entered.detail: vaulted stone passage with ribbed ceiling and thick walls
stone winged gargoyle statues flanking the gate entrance
ornate ribbed stone ceiling of the gate tunnel

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered stone archway, leaving the bridge behind. The space becomes enclosed with a vaulted stone ceiling and dim artificial lighting from wall-mounted lamps. Winged gargoyle statues flank the passage as the character walks toward the distant light of the courtyard exit, with castle towers visible through the arch ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open castle courtyard with main building approach

events.description: exiting the archway into the open courtyard with the main castle building revealed ahead
location text 'Hogwarts Grounds' appears at bottom left of screen
camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the castle spires against the night sky

agents.ego_description: walking across the courtyard toward the main castle building while looking up at the illuminated towers

entered.detail: massive gothic castle facade with multiple illuminated towers and tall windows
wide dirt path leading toward the castle entrance
small ground-level lanterns lining both sides of the courtyard path
dark silhouetted mountain range visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gate tunnel, the scene opens into a vast courtyard with the magnificent Hogwarts castle rising ahead. The character walks along a lantern-lit path toward the illuminated facade while the camera pans up to reveal towering spires against the starry night sky. The location text 'Hogwarts Grounds' appears as distant mountains frame the left side of the open space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling cobblestone bridge through a narrow stone gateway and into a vast, open castle courtyard at night. It begins with the character walking toward a massive gothic gate under the glow of warm lamplights, passing other students as the location text Hogwarts North Exit appears. As the character enters the imposing archway, the environment shifts from the open bridge to an enclosed passage with a vaulted stone ceiling and winged gargoyle statues flanking the dim, lamp-lit corridor. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the tunnel into the Hogwarts Grounds, where the view opens up to a magnificent illuminated facade and a lantern-lit path. Finally, the camera pans upward to reveal towering spires against a starry night sky, with distant mountains framing the edge of the expansive courtyard.
